evals.prompt: The validation report found that Phase 5 of the three-package-split plan has a broken import path. The plan says to import from @prism-core/utils but the actual module exports from @prism-core/lib. Iterate on the plan to fix this.
evals.expected_output: Presents an Iteration Needed summary identifying the trigger, current state, changes required, and impact. Updates the plan with an iteration log entry. Resumes implementation from the corrected phase.
expectations: Reads the full plan before making any changes
Presents a structured 'Iteration Needed' block with Trigger, Current State, Changes Required, and Impact
Adds an Iteration Log entry to the plan with date, reason, and specific changes
Does NOT delete existing plan content — uses strikethrough or annotations to preserve history
Gets user approval before resuming implementation
Resumes from the affected phase, not from the beginning

evals.prompt: The user says 'the sidebar layout needs to change from vertical to horizontal'. Iterate on the plan to accommodate this vague feedback.
evals.expected_output: Questions the vague feedback before making changes. Asks clarifying questions about which sidebar, what horizontal means in context, and impact on other phases.
expectations: Does not immediately rewrite the plan based on vague feedback
Asks clarifying questions (which sidebar, what does horizontal mean, scope of change)
Follows the 'Be Skeptical' philosophy — questions vague feedback and verifies feasibility
Follows the 'Be Interactive' philosophy — confirms understanding before making changes
Only proceeds with plan changes after getting clear answers

evals.prompt: Iterate on the plan. Phase 7 needs a new sub-phase 7.5 to handle database migration that was discovered during implementation. The new phase requires understanding the existing ORM setup.
evals.expected_output: Spawns research agents to understand the ORM setup before adding Phase 7.5 to the plan. Updates success criteria if needed.
expectations: Spawns research subagents (codebase-locator, codebase-analyzer) to understand the ORM setup
Adds Phase 7.5 to the plan without disrupting completed phases
Updates TodoWrite to reflect the new phase
Maintains the separation of automated vs manual success criteria
Leaves no unresolved questions in the updated plan
